title: What to Know About the SpaceX IPO
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is poised to have the largest stock-market debut in history when it goes public later in June. SpaceX is aiming to raise $75 billion in the initial public offering, more than twice the previous record holder.

title: South Korea’s Left-Wing Wins Big in Local Vote in Boost for Lee
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung’s party won a resounding victory in key local elections, piling pressure on opposition conservatives as they struggle to reinvent their party after the debacle of their former leader’s martial law decree.
